block_02: The gate to the real market is now open for you! Start investing whenever you’re ready.
block_03: To help you take off, we share a simplistic yet very useful trend trading strategy ⬇️
block_09: Binary/digital options, Forex, stocks, crypto, ETFs, commodities
block_12: Moving averages are used to help traders confirm a trend using previous price action. There are two types of MAs: simple moving averages (SMA) and exponential moving averages (EMA).
block_13: SMA usually relies on the closing price of a market, which can make it slower to react. For this reason, traders use SMA for longer-term contracts.
block_14: EMAs also rely on past price data but more weight is given to prices that are more recent. This makes EMA more relevant for binary and digital options traders.
block_16: When the chart crosses the indicator from above with red candlesticks, it means that the price of the asset drops, and the fall may continue. This is the signal to SELL.
block_17: When the green candlesticks cross the indicator’s line from below, this is a sign of a trend reversal and a signal to BUY.
